creator: emikulic@gmail.com
text:
This version kernel works:

# uname -K
1003507

Log looks weird though:

ppp[440]: tun0: IPV6CP: deflink: LayerUp.
ppp[440]: tun0: ID0: 2 = socket(28, 2, 0)

ppp[440]: tun0: ID0: bug 218517: errno = 4 (Interrupted system call)
